plugins.name: toolbelt
plugins.description: Connect Claude to your governed Toolbelt org — set up assistants, services, and playbooks in one conversation.

plugins.name: chief-of-staff
plugins.description: An always-on digital Chief of Staff for founders and executives. Turns a noisy inbox, calendar, and meeting stream into a clear operating picture — email triage, meeting prep, daily briefs, and follow-through. Routing skill — pair with the Chief-of-Staff connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

plugins.name: smart-ticketing
plugins.description: A feedback-triage assistant: turns raw bug reports and feature ideas into clean, deduplicated, structured tickets — and keeps the triage board honest. Routing skill — pair with the Smart-Ticketing connector (.mcpb or gateway URL). Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).
